candidates.name: BNB/USDT 4h Momentum Pullback

candidates.name: BNB/USDT 4h Mean-Reversion (RSI/Bollinger)
candidates.description: Fade capitulation below the lower Bollinger band while above the long-term trend; exit on reversion to the mean.
candidates.reasoning: Mean-reversion: buy oversold dislocations (below lower band + low RSI) but only with the long-term trend (above EMA200); take profit as price reverts toward the mean. Signal context: regime=risk_on, F&G=63, funding=0.0120%. [walk-forward: 10 OOS windows, beat buy&hold in 50%; median OOS -1.36% vs benchmark +0.19%; Sharpe -1.47, maxDD 34.5%, 24 trades, risk_score 22/100.]
